subject: chemistry
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.26
question_html:
Which is a homologous series?

A.  C2H4, C3H5, C4H6

B.  C2H2, C3H4, C4H6

C.  C2H2, C2H4, C2H6

D.  C2H2, C4H4, C6H6
examiners_html: 45% of the candidates identified the members of the same homologous series (ethyne, propyne and butyne). The most commonly chosen distractor included the compounds C2H2, C4H4 and C6H6. The question had good discrimination between high-scoring and low-scoring candidates.
